parameters.content:
## 11 — Stripe reconciliation

The primary Stripe webhook (`checkout.session.completed`) is handled by the admin's `/api/webhooks/stripe` route, which has signature verification and side-effects (payment row, lead status, receipt email, resource delivery).

This n8n workflow runs every 6 h as a safety net: it lists Stripe sessions paid in the last 7 days and inserts a `pipeline_events` ERROR row for any that didn't make it into `payments`.
